cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 4.2.2.0)
cmake_policy(SET CMP0126 OLD)
cmake_policy(SET CMP0128 OLD)
project(CMAKE_TRY_COMPILE C)
set_property(DIRECTORY PROPERTY INCLUDE_DIRECTORIES "")
set(CMAKE_VERBOSE_MAKEFILE 1)
set(CMAKE_C_FLAGS "")
set(CMAKE_C_FLAGS "${CMAKE_C_FLAGS} ${COMPILE_DEFINITIONS}")
set(CMAKE_C_FLAGS_DEBUG "")
set(CMAKE_EXE_LINKER_FLAGS "")
set(CMAKE_EXE_LINKER_FLAGS "${CMAKE_EXE_LINKER_FLAGS} ${EXE_LINKER_FLAGS}")
include_directories(${INCLUDE_DIRECTORIES})
set(CMAKE_SUPPRESS_REGENERATION 1)
link_directories(${LINK_DIRECTORIES})
cmake_policy(SET CMP0083 NEW)
cmake_policy(SET CMP0155 OLD)
cmake_policy(SET CMP0157 OLD)
cmake_policy(SET CMP0181 OLD)
include("${CMAKE_ROOT}/Modules/Internal/HeaderpadWorkaround.cmake")
set(CMAKE_RUNTIME_OUTPUT_DIRECTORY "C:/Users/elias/CLionProjects/untitled1/build-2048/CMakeFiles/CMakeScratch/TryCompile-qxospk")
add_executable(cmTC_a00ae)
target_sources(cmTC_a00ae PRIVATE
  "C:/Program Files/JetBrains/CLion 2026.1.1/bin/cmake/win/x64/share/cmake-4.2/Modules/CMakeCCompilerABI.c"
)
file(GENERATE OUTPUT "${CMAKE_BINARY_DIR}/cmTC_a00ae_loc"
     CONTENT $<TARGET_FILE:cmTC_a00ae>)
target_link_libraries(cmTC_a00ae ${LINK_LIBRARIES})
